settings.eyebrow: Your brain is fried. Here's the reset.
settings.heading: Quit cheap dopamine. Feel good for real — in 7 days.
settings.subheading: Endless scrolling fried your reward system, so nothing feels good anymore. The Dopamine Reset is a simple 10-min-a-day protocol that rewires your brain to enjoy real life again — starting today.

settings.text: Wakes up and scrolls before both eyes are even open.
Needs noise, snacks and 3 tabs just to feel normal.
Can't focus for 10 minutes without reaching for the phone.
Everything feels a little flat and grey.
Wakes up clear-headed, phone stays down for the first hour.
Can sit with a coffee and just… be. No itch.
Deep-focuses for hours and actually enjoys it.
Small things feel good again — the colour's back.

settings.eyebrow: There are two kinds of dopamine
settings.heading: Cheap dopamine drains you. Real dopamine builds you.
How fried is your dopamine? Find out.
settings.subheading: Answer 4 honest questions and find out where you're really at (and what to do about it).

7 days. If you don't feel the shift, it's free.
settings.text: Do the reset for a week. If your head isn't clearer and your days don't feel better, email us and get every cent back — no forms, no awkward questions. The only risk is staying foggy.

settings.q: How do I get access after paying?
settings.a: The moment Shopify confirms your payment you're auto-redirected straight to Day 1 — no email, no waiting.
No. It's a structured 7-day protocol with a daily action, craving tools and a real-dopamine menu. Deleting apps alone doesn't rewire anything — this does.
About 10 minutes. It's built for real life, not a monastery.

settings.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
settings.a: 7-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. You risk nothing.
No — once-off payment. The R299 option adds lifetime top-ups, but even that's a single payment.

settings.heading: You can keep scrolling. Or you can feel good again.
settings.subheading: 7 days from now you'll either feel clearer, lighter and more like yourself — or exactly the same. R199. Pick.

settings.title: Laser focus
settings.text: Sit down and get real work done — for hours — without the itch to check your phone.

settings.title: Genuine happiness
settings.text: Normal life feels good again — mornings, music, food, people. The colour comes back.

settings.title: Real energy
settings.text: Wake up clear and charged instead of foggy, flat and already tired.

settings.title: Momentum for your goals
settings.text: Show up for school, money, training, your craft — and watch your life actually move.

settings.title: Real connection
settings.text: Be fully there with the people you love. Present — not half-scrolling.

settings.title: Self-respect
settings.text: Do the hard thing on purpose. Look in the mirror and like who’s looking back.

settings.heading: This isn’t about your phone. It’s about your life.
settings.lead: Cheap dopamine quietly steals your focus, your mood and your drive. Get it back, and everything downstream gets better — school, money, health, the people you love.
settings.note: Most people feel the shift by day 3.
